summary: Testing of Device Checkout Flow features: Landing page translations (Vishing, Smishing, Phishing, Suplantación), SOS Services page with device order form, per-device color selector, scalable shipping costs, device style selector (Juvenil, Adulto, Senior), and call support button (601510950). All features working correctly. Backend API tests 11/11 passed.
verified_features: Landing page 'Protección contra Amenazas Digitales' section with Vishing, Smishing, Phishing, Suplantación cards - WORKING
SOS Services page (/servicios-sos) loads correctly with device order form - WORKING
Call support button shows phone 601510950 and triggers tel: link - WORKING
Shipping cost scales correctly: 1 device=4.95€, 2=6.95€, 3=8.95€ (verified up to 10=22.95€) - WORKING
Per-device color selector appears when quantity > 1 (shows Dispositivo 1, 2, 3 etc.) - WORKING
Device style selector works (Juvenil, Adulto, Senior) - WORKING
Main device image changes when style is selected (Juvenil=orange/teal, Adulto=silver, Senior=green) - WORKING
Color preview indicator shows which device is being visualized (#1 badge on main image) - WORKING
Backend API /api/payments/device/checkout accepts colors array and device_style - WORKING
Backend API /api/payments/plans returns correct pricing with trial info - WORKING
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are working correctly
Landing page translations (Vishing, Smishing, Phishing, Suplantación) displayed in Spanish
Per-device color selection working with dynamic preview
Device style images (juvenil, adulto, senior) switching dynamically
Call support button with tel: link triggers correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device checkout flow fully working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_device_checkout_flow.py for regression testing. All features verified: landing page threat cards, SOS Services page with device order form, per-device color selector, scalable shipping, device styles, call support button.

mocked_apis.notes: Stripe integration is REAL but requires valid card for full checkout flow
